subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of the Lord! According to certain chronicles of old, it hath become evident that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه حضرت پروردگار از قرار روایت برخی از تواریخ سلف چنین معلوم که
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
